title: Itanagar, Arunachal Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Itanagar, Arunachal Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Itanagar is a city in Arunachal Pradesh with a population of 60,000. The capital of Arunachal Pradesh, a scenic city in the Himalayan foothills known for its tribal culture and ancient Ita Fort.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
